pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh (line 9, 36), export_result.sh (line 9), and verifier.py (line 63). This is the expected output file location for the task.
Verified in task_utils.sh (lines 6, 58, 64-65), setup_nuxeo.sh (lines 44-45, 283), and export_result.sh (line 42). This is the base URL for Nuxeo REST API endpoints.

Verified in task.json description (extract fields: title, type, path, creator, created), export_result.sh (lines 56-60 ground truth generation), and verifier.py (line 106 required_keys check). Task specifies: 'title' (dc:title), 'type', 'path', 'creator' (dc:creator), and 'created' (dc:created).

privileged_info_summary: The export_document_inventory task is designed to extract document metadata from a Nuxeo Platform instance. It queries the REST API at http://localhost:8080/nuxeo/api/v1 to retrieve children of '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects', filters to File and Note types, and extracts five required fields (title, type, path, creator, created) into a JSON array saved to /home/ga/Documents/project_inventory.json. The task uses synthetic PDF documents (ACME Annual Report 2023, Enterprise Cloud Migration Project Proposal, Q3 2023 reports) that are generated using ReportLab and uploaded to Nuxeo during environment setup. The task credentials are Administrator/Administrator. All three metadata claims have been independently verified against the actual implementation code.
